name: Drum Rack Jumbler
author: Adam Murray
description: Manipulates Drum Rack devices: swaps pad mappings, randomizes or centers pad panning, pitch-shifts Simpler pads by +/-1, +/-12, or +/-24 semitones, and resets pitch shifts. Works with Drum Racks on tracks or nested inside Instrument Racks.
notes: No prebuilt .ablx published yet — build from the source repo.
